Uses of Class
situations.Situation

Packages that use Situation
Package
Description
buttons
This package contains different button classes

  • Uses of Situation in buttons

    Constructors in buttons with parameters of type Situation
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    BinOpButton(String label, Situation situation, IntBinaryOperator op)
    Constructs a BinOpButton with the specified label, situation, and binary operation.
     
    CalculatorButton(String label, Situation situation)
    Constructs a CalculatorButton with the specified label and situation.
     
    CancelButton(String label, Situation situation)
    Constructs a CancelButton with the specified label and situation
     
    DigitButton(String string, Situation situation)
    Represents a button in the calculator keypad that corresponds to a digit.
     
    EqualsButton(String label, Situation situation)
    Constructs an EqualsButton with the specified label and situation
